style_guidelines.color_palette: Sophisticated neutrals: off-white (#f5f5f0), charcoal (#2d2d2d), single accent color (burgundy #7c2d12, forest #14532d, navy #1e3a5f)
style_guidelines.typography: Refined serif for headlines (Playfair Display style), clean sans-serif body (Söhne style), dramatic size hierarchy (96pt/16pt), generous line-height 1.6
style_guidelines.imagery: Magazine-quality photography, dramatic crops, full-bleed images, editorial lighting (Vogue, Bloomberg style)
style_guidelines.layout: Sophisticated grid system (12-column), intentional asymmetry, pull quotes as design elements, text wrapping around images
style_guidelines.effects: Minimal effects - let photography and typography shine, subtle image treatments (slight desaturation, film grain)
